title: Paragramma longifolia
taxonomy: Paragramma longifolia belongs to the family Cichlidae, which includes over 1,600 species of fish. It is part of the genus Paragramma, which consists of a small number of species found primarily in Southeast Asia. Within the family Cichlidae, Paragramma longifolia is classified under the subfamily Etroplinae. This classification indicates its close relationship to other species within the Etroplinae subfamily. Further study is necessary to determine the exact classification and relationships within the Paragramma genus.
